trivia_bullets.text: The flavor text names two distinct Eldraine locations: Lochmere (the mist-shrouded lake surrounding Castle Vantress, the blue knowledge court) and Irencrag (the volcanic boulder at the heart of Embereth, the red courage court). A creature surviving the cold of one court is destroyed by the fire of the other.
"It emerged from the coldest depths of Lochmere only to face the fires of Irencrag." — No named speaker. Structured as tragic irony: survival of the deep cold only to be destroyed by heat.

Carries the Adamant keyword (new to ELD): if at least three red mana was spent, deals an additional 3 damage to the creature's controller beyond the baseline 5 to the creature. Adamant was ELD's keyword cycle for the five courts, associating red with fire-magic damage scaling.
Illustrated by Allen Williams, known for detailed creature and horror-adjacent fantasy illustration.

related_cards.name: Lochmere Serpent
related_cards.note: Blue-black Serpent from the same Lochmere lake named in the flavor text; likely depicts the same type of creature

related_cards.name: Irencrag Pyromancer
related_cards.note: Named Irencrag wizard; companion card to the 'fires of Irencrag' reference in this card's flavor

related_cards.name: Irencrag Feat
related_cards.note: Sorcery producing massive red mana from the Irencrag; shares the lore anchor
